types:type-duplicate-cross-package.severity: mixed (1 blocker + 5 major + 8 minor across 4 cycles)
types:type-duplicate-cross-package.note: R11 APPLIED iter-006. iter-028 R11 effectiveness audit: Round 3 closed 4 of 5 P0/P1 R11 sites (Database, RevenueSplit, Logger family, orgmanagement) — STRONG. Three R11 sites remain: lqvw4.1 (P0 SessionData/UserData STILL RED), lqvw4.5 (OrganizationMembership extended to 3 sites this cycle = F1), lqvw4.6 (TemplateScope triple). iter-028 surfaced 4 NEW R11 inline-shape sites: F1 OrganizationMembership 3rd site (extends lqvw4.5), F2 ObsWarnSink (Codex-4mvr0), F3 ObservabilityClient name collision (Codex-c9qyd), F6 SessionData recurrence (lqvw4.1 traceability only). Cumulative cycle_density=20 across 4 cycles. R11's effectiveness scope is bounded by Tier 3.A/4.B/6.A's audit reach; SessionData/UserData and inline observability projections are the next-priority gaps.

types:type-narrowing-incomplete-orgmanag.note: BLOCKER on blast-radius grounds (6 silent type-system bypasses in production routes). NEW fingerprint. Single-hit security exception does NOT fire (phase=types not security).

types:as-cast-without-guard.rule_id: R7 PROMOTION QUEUED for iter-029 prep
types:as-cast-without-guard.note: **R7 STANDARD 3-HIT THRESHOLD REACHED in iter-028.** Hits 3 in trailing 6 cycles (iter-005, iter-006, iter-028). iter-028 F5 = DatabaseTransaction cast at content-service.ts:158 — exposed by Tier 6.A's Database widening (DatabaseTransaction not similarly widened). Per SKILL.md §7, the next cycle's prep adds R-rule. Suggested rule: 'Type assertions of the form `value as Foo` where Foo is more specific than the source type MUST be guarded by a runtime check (Zod schema, type guard, or instanceof) — except for Drizzle infinite-recursion bridges, framework defaults like `{} as TPolicy`, and Proxy-target placeholders.' Exception list is non-trivial — recommend drafting first, human-reviewing before adding to §1.

Candidate rule: Structural shapes consumed across ≥2 component-family files MUST resolve to a single declaration site (sibling types.ts, package barrel, or generated wire shape via NonNullable<...>); inline interface/type redeclarations exactly matching an exported sibling are blocker.

types:literal-union-drift-vs-runtime-pre.note: NEW fingerprint. ProcedurePolicy.rateLimit hand-written union ('api'|'auth'|'strict'|'public'|'webhook'|'streaming') drifts from RATE_LIMIT_PRESETS keys ('api'|'auth'|'strict'|'streaming'|'webhook'|'web'). Allows 'public' (no preset), disallows 'web' (actual preset). Track for recurrence — if recurs across packages cycles, candidate for R-rule promotion (hand-written literal unions mirroring runtime objects MUST use keyof typeof X).

Track for recurrence — if 2-hit, promotion review.
